step_rationale: Myocyte stretch marker; reflect post-MI cardiac dysfunction and heart-failure risk.
mechanism: Natriuretic peptides are released by stressed ventricular myocardium post-infarction, indicating ventricular remodeling and hemodynamic compromise.

references.title: Novel biomarkers predicting cardiac function after acute myocardial infarction.

Laboratory parameters of cardiac and kidney dysfunction in cardio-renal syndromes.
The role of existing and novel cardiac biomarkers for cardioprotection.
references.journal: Current opinion in investigational drugs (London, England : 2000)
